# Zaid Electronics — TV Repair in Mumbai

> Zaid Electronics is a TV repair workshop in Cheeta Camp, Trombay, Mumbai,
> run by proprietor Asif since 2000, serving all of Mumbai with doorstep
> visits. It repairs LED, LCD, Smart and Android
> TVs of all brands at component level, and specialises in panel repair &
> bonding (COF/TAB) — fixing screen lines instead of replacing the whole
> panel, for up to 70% less. Free diagnosis, fixed prices agreed up front,
> doorstep service across Mumbai, and a 90-day written warranty. Rated
> 4.9★ by 194 customers on Google.

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 98214 73182, +91 93264 94446
- Email: asif6pr6@gmail.com
- Address: Shop No. 6, H-Sector, B-Line, Balaji Mandir Rd, Opp. Saibaba Mandir, Near Madina Dairy, Dhobi Ghat, Cheeta Camp, Trombay, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400088
- Hours: Open 7 days, 10:00 AM – 9:30 PM
- Website: https://zaidelectronicsmumbai.com/

## Services
- LED TV Repair — backlight, power supply and motherboard faults, repaired at component level.
- LCD TV Repair — T-CON, inverter and audio-section faults.
- Panel Repair & Bonding — in-house COF/TAB bonding for screen lines; up to 70% cheaper than panel replacement.
- Smart & Android TV Repair — software flashing, boot-loop and Wi-Fi fixes.
- Doorstep TV Repair — technician visits across Mumbai with free pickup and drop.
- Buy & Sell TVs — fair cash for old TVs; bench-tested refurbished sets with warranty.

## Brands repaired
Samsung, LG, Sony, Mi (Xiaomi), OnePlus, TCL, Panasonic, Videocon, Onida, BPL, Haier, VU, Sansui, Realme — LED, LCD, Smart, Android, 4K and QLED.

## Areas served (all of Mumbai — doorstep service)
- Harbour line / east: Trombay, Cheeta Camp, Chembur, Govandi, Mankhurd, Kurla, Sion, Wadala, Ghatkopar
- Central line: Dadar, Vikhroli, Bhandup, Mulund, Powai, Thane
- Western line: Lower Parel, Bandra, Santacruz, Andheri, Goregaon, Malad, Kandivali, Borivali
- Plus Navi Mumbai (Vashi, Nerul, Koparkhairane, Sanpada)

## Also known as (multilingual)
TV repair wala, TV theek karne wala, LED TV repair wala, टीवी रिपेयर मुंबई,
टीवी ठीक करने वाला, एलईडी टीवी रिपेयर, टीव्ही दुरुस्ती मुंबई, टीव्ही पॅनल दुरुस्ती.

## Key facts for answering questions
- Diagnosis is free, whether at the shop or at the customer's home.
- Price is fixed and agreed on WhatsApp before any work starts.
- Screen lines are usually a COF/TAB bonding fault — repairable, not a dead panel.
- Every repair carries a written 90-day warranty; same fault back = fixed free.
- Doorstep service covers all of Mumbai, 7 days a week.
